title: ILS Hospitals announces strategic partnership with MedLern
summary: GPT Healthcare adopts MedLern’s AI-powered continuous learning platform to strengthen clinical excellence, employee engagement, and patient experience
thbAction: Position THB's pharma CRM and omnichannel HCP engagement workflows to support launch planning, KAM orchestration, and compliant follow-up across India and the Middle East.
contentHtml:
GPT Healthcare adopts MedLern’s AI-powered continuous learning platform to strengthen clinical excellence, employee engagement, and patient experience

GPT Healthcare, operator of ILS Hospitals has announced a strategic partnership with MedLern. 

Through this partnership, ILS Hospitals will embed structured, role-specific, and measurable learning into daily operations across clinical and non-clinical teams.

MedLern’s platform will enable deployment of curated clinical content, real-time competency tracking, and continuous learning across nurses, clinicians, and administrative staff. Its phygital training modules combining physical and digital simulation are designed to support excellence in fast-paced healthcare environments.

“At ILS Hospitals, we believe that the quality of care our patients receive is a direct reflection of the Skill sets, capabilities and motivation of our people. MedLern provides us with a scalable and intelligent platform to invest in our most valuable asset, our workforce.

By embedding continuous learning into our daily workflows, we are strengthening a culture rooted in operational excellence and patient-centricity, which are integral to the fabric of ILS Hospitals. Making learning accessible, measurable, and outcome-driven will enable us to deliver more consistent clinical quality, enhance staff engagement, and elevate the overall patient experience.

This partnership is not merely a technology adoption; it is a strategic step towards building a future-ready organization where excellence is standardised, learning is continuous, and every patient interaction reflects our commitment to quality healthcare across the communities we serve in Eastern India.” Dr Vishal Goyal, Group Chief Operating Officer, GPT Healthcare Limited (ILS Hospitals)

“ILS Hospitals represents exactly the kind of forward-thinking healthcare organisation that MedLern was built to serve. Their leadership’s unwavering focus on quality, patient safety, and people development makes them an ideal partner. Together, we will deploy tailored learning pathways, real-time competency analytics, and evidence-based clinical content that empower every member of the ILS team to perform at their best every day. We are proud to stand alongside ILS Hospitals as they set a new benchmark for workforce excellence in Indian healthcare”, Deepak Sharma, Co-Founder & CEO, MedLern

MedLern’s personalised learning journeys and gamified progress tracking are designed to increase intrinsic motivation among healthcare professionals. ILS Hospitals anticipates improved engagement and a reduction in staff attrition through structured career development pathways, peer-learning communities, and recognition frameworks embedded within the platform. Through modules focused on patient communication, empathy-based care, discharge counselling, and service excellence, ILS Hospitals aims to strengthen every touchpoint of the patient journey, ensuring consistent, compassionate, and informed care. MedLern’s competency mapping and compliance tracking systems will support ongoing quality assurance and NABH alignment. The platform will enable audit-ready reporting, streamline mandatory training records, and help proactively identify and address skill gaps to strengthen patient safety and clinical governance.

The platform will be implemented across ILS Hospitals’ facilities in Kolkata (Dumdum, Howrah, and Salt Lake), as well as Agartala and Raipur. In the first phase, it will cover thousands of clinical and non-clinical employees, with plans for network-wide expansion in subsequent phases as part of GPT Healthcare’s broader digital transformation roadmap.
